answer_preview.preview: "A default merge policy in Adobe Experience Platform defines the rules for combining identity graph records when multiple profiles share the same identity. output.final_answer: A default merge policy in Adobe Experience Platform defines the rules for combining identity graph records when multiple. Based on the local snapshot, available merge policies include Person: Birthday Today 001 (ID: 22a941a9-e598-45f8-846b-c9a8889f5035), Campaign: 25% Off Purchase Offer Reminder, and Campaign: New Application Credit Card Offer. However, the specific default merge policy for the '_xdm.context.profile' schema class could not be identified because live API evidence was unavailable due to unavailable Adobe credentials.
